positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for badults_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for badults_pos.tptp
1. series(badults) [input(axiom)]
2. working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [input(axiom)]
3. script_editor(andrew_collins,badults) [input(axiom)]
4. ? [X0] : (series(X0) & working_title(X0,secret_dude_society) & script_editor(andrew_collins,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
5. ~? [X0] : (series(X0) & working_title(X0,secret_dude_society) & script_editor(andrew_collins,X0)) [negated conjecture 4]
6. ! [X0] : (~series(X0) | ~working_title(X0,secret_dude_society) | ~script_editor(andrew_collins,X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
7. series(badults) [cnf transformation 1]
8. working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [cnf transformation 2]
9. script_editor(andrew_collins,badults) [cnf transformation 3]
10. ~script_editor(andrew_collins,X0) | ~working_title(X0,secret_dude_society) | ~series(X0) [cnf transformation 6]
11. ~working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) | ~series(badults) [resolution 9,10]
12. ~series(badults) [forward subsumption resolution 11,8]
13. $false [forward subsumption resolution 12,7]
% SZS output end Proof for badults_pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
